title: Nor Buying Or Selling.
content:
Now, if you love me, tell me,
    For as I will not sell ye,
    So not one cross to buy thee
    I'll give, if thou deny me.
meaning:
"Nor Buying Or Selling." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
